name: Pre-existing hearing issues, still claim new work damage?

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing hearing issues, still claim new work damage?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, claim aggravation from work noise; comp covers worsened loss.[5] Context: Prove job accelerated progression.[1] Key factors: Baseline tests vs. current, NIHL pattern.[1][4] Practical guidance: Get comparative audiograms, file claim; lawyer differentiates.[7] Aggravation compensable.
